calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Dec-12-2022 Vacated

Defendant Ali Mahmoud'S Notice Of Motion For Evidentiary Or Terminating Sanctions Against Plaintiff Carl Gustavson, Or In The Alternative For Motion To Enforce Court Order And Stipulation, Compel Answers And Documents, And Vacate Trial; And For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Nov-18-2022 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT ALI MAHMOUD'S Motion For Evidentiary Or Terminating Sanctions Against Plaintiff Carl Gustavson, Or In The Alternative For Motion To Enforce Court Order And Stipulation, Compel Answers And Documents, And Vacate Trial; And For Monetary Sanctions is Off calendar. Case settled.

Judge: Curtis E Karnow, Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. =(302/CEK)

Defendant Ali Mahmoud'S Notice Of Motion For Evidentiary Or Terminating Sanctions Against Plaintiff Carl Gustavson, Or In The Alternative For Motion To Enforce Court Order And Stipulation, Compel Answers And Documents, And Vacate Trial; And For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Oct-20-2022 Continued To Nov-18-22 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. JOHN J. ROACH, Esq. of Law Office of John J. Roach (Tel: 415-851-4557) for plaintiff Carl Gustavson;
Atty. JOSEPH KIM, Esq. of Cholakian & Associates (Tel: 650-871-9544) for defendant Ali Mahmoud.

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT ALI MAHMOUD's Motion For Evidentiary Or Terminating Sanctions Against Plaintiff Carl Gustavson, Or In The Alternative For Motion To Enforce Court Order And Stipulation, Compel Answers And Documents, And Vacate Trial; And For Monetary Sanctions.

Plaintiff does not stipulate to the matter being decided by the pro tem judge.

Matter discussed.

Matter is continued to November 18, 2022 at 9:30 a.m. in Dept. 302, Law & Motion.

Pro tem judge to prepare a report and recommendation.

Judge Pro Tem: William Lynn; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Jane Hong Elsey, CSR No. 11975, Email: csrjane@hotmail.com, Tel: 909-831-2644 (302/JPT)

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jul-14-2022 Continued To Dec-14-22 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

MOTION TO CONTINUE JURY TRIAL
Off Calendar Jul-14-2022 Text Ruling

Notice Of Motion In Support Of Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support Of Motion To Compel Answers And Documents, Without Objection To Form Interrogatories Special Interrogatories And Request For Production Of Documents Set No 1 To Plaintiff Carl Gustavson
Off Calendar Nov-19-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. JOSEPH KIM, Esq. of Cholakian & Associates (Tel: 650-871-9544) for defendant Ali Mahmoud;
No other appearances made in this matter.

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT ALI MAHMOUD's Motion To Compel Answers And Documents, Without Objection To Form Interrogatories Special Interrogatories And Request For Production Of Documents Set No 1 To Plaintiff Carl Gustavson.

Defendant stipulates to the matter being decided by the Judge Pro Tem. The Judge Pro Tem and counsel for defendant authorize the clerk to sign the formal stipulation form on their behalf.

The Court's tentative ruling instructed the parties to appear. The Court notes no appearance has been made by or for plaintiff.

The Court takes the matter under submission.

The Court instructs defense counsel to prepare a proposed order which outlines the current outstanding discovery. Defense counsel are to email the proposed order to the opposing side by noon today for review/approval. By 5pm today, defense counsel is to email the proposed order in Word format to the Judge Pro Tem at Peter.Catalanotti@wilsonelser.com.

Judge Pro Tem: Peter Catalanotti; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/JPT)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
